subject: D7: Build scripts/rule_dependency_graph.py
description: Static analysis: parse inventory_forecaster.py AST to extract (a) every _fire("Fxx") call site with surrounding line range, (b) every meta[...] read and write per rule, (c) every fcst[...] write per rule. Emit a DOT graph file and a markdown table showing which rules depend on which meta keys. Surfaces hidden ordering dependencies (e.g. F59a reads meta["f18_capped_down"] set by crostens()).
